components:
  schemas:
    ListPasskeysRequest:
      type: object
      properties: {}
    PasskeyListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          description: List of passkeys
        page:
          type: integer
          description: Current page
        pageSize:
          type: integer
          description: Items per page
        total:
          type: integer
          description: Total items
    CreatePasskeyRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        credentialId:
          type: string
          description: WebAuthn credential ID
        publicKey:
          type: string
          description: Credential public key
        deviceName:
          type: string
          description: Friendly device name
        transports:
          type: array
          description: Supported transports
      required:
      - credentialId
      - publicKey
    PasskeyResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: Passkey ID
        credentialId:
          type: string
          description: WebAuthn credential ID
        deviceName:
          type: string
          description: Friendly device name
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          description: Update timestamp
    GetPasskeyRequest:
      type: object
      properties: {}
    UpdatePasskeyRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        deviceName:
          type: string
          description: Friendly device name
        transports:
          type: array
          description: Supported transports
    DeletePasskeyRequest:
      type: object
      properties: {}
    DeletePasskeyResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        deleted:
          type: boolean
          description: Deletion result
    BatchCreatePasskeysRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          description: Array of passkey creation objects
      required:
      - items
    BatchPasskeyResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        created:
          type: array
          description: Created passkeys
        failed:
          type: array
          description: Failed items with errors
    PasskeyRegistrationOptionsRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        userId:
          type: string
          description: User ID
        deviceName:
          type: string
          description: Device name
      required:
      - userId
    PasskeyRegistrationOptionsResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        challenge:
          type: string
          description: Registration challenge
        rpId:
          type: string
          description: Relying party ID
        user:
          type: object
          description: User info
        timeout:
          type: integer
          description: Timeout in ms
    PasskeyRegistrationVerifyRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        userId:
          type: string
          description: User ID
        credential:
          type: object
          description: WebAuthn credential response
      required:
      - userId
      - credential
    PasskeyRegistrationVerifyResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        passkeyId:
          type: string
          description: Created passkey ID
        verified:
          type: boolean
          description: Verification result
    PasskeyAuthOptionsRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        userIdentifier:
          type: string
          description: Username or user ID
        rpId:
          type: string
          description: Relying party ID
      required:
      - userIdentifier
    PasskeyAuthOptionsResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        challenge:
          type: string
          description: Authentication challenge
        allowCredentials:
          type: array
          description: Allowed credential IDs
        timeout:
          type: integer
          description: Timeout in ms
    PasskeyAuthVerifyRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        credential:
          type: object
          description: WebAuthn credential response
      required:
      - credential
    PasskeyAuthVerifyResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        sessionId:
          type: string
          description: Session ID
        accessToken:
          type: string
          description: Access token
        refreshToken:
          type: string
          description: Refresh token
    ListDevicesRequest:
      type: object
      properties: {}
    DeviceListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          description: List of devices
        page:
          type: integer
          description: Current page
        pageSize:
          type: integer
          description: Page size
        total:
          type: integer
          description: Total items
    CreateDeviceRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        platform:
          type: string
          description: Device platform (ios, android, windows, mac, linux)
        model:
          type: string
          description: Device model
        deviceId:
          type: string
          description: Client-generated device ID
      required:
      - platform
      - deviceId
    DeviceResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: Device registration ID
        deviceId:
          type: string
          description: Device identifier
        platform:
          type: string
          description: Platform
    GetDeviceRequest:
      type: object
      properties: {}
    UpdateDeviceRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        model:
          type: string
          description: Device model
        platform:
          type: string
          description: Device platform
      required:
      - platform
    DeleteDeviceRequest:
      type: object
      properties: {}
    DeleteDeviceResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        deleted:
          type: boolean
          description: Deletion status
    BatchCreateDevicesRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          description: Device items
          items:
            type: object
            description: Device payload
      required:
      - items
    BatchDeviceResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        created:
          type: array
          description: Created devices
        failed:
          type: array
          description: Failed items with errors
    ListSessionsRequest:
      type: object
      properties: {}
    SessionListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          description: Session list
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              id:
                type: string
                description: Session ID
              userId:
                type: string
                description: User ID
              deviceId:
                type: string
                description: Device ID
              createdAt:
                type: string
                description: Creation timestamp
              lastActiveAt:
                type: string
                description: Last active timestamp
        page:
          type: integer
          description: Current page
        pageSize:
          type: integer
          description: Items per page
        total:
          type: integer
          description: Total items
    CreateSessionRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        username:
          type: string
          description: Username
        password:
          type: string
          description: Password
      required:
      - username
      - password
    SessionResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        sessionId:
          type: string
          description: Session ID
        token:
          type: string
          description: Access token
    GetSessionRequest:
      type: object
      properties: {}
    UpdateSessionRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        lastActiveAt:
          type: string
          description: Last activity timestamp (ISO-8601)
      required:
      - lastActiveAt
    DeleteSessionRequest:
      type: object
      properties: {}
    DeleteSessionResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: Session ID
        revoked:
          type: boolean
          description: Revocation status
    BatchCreateSessionsRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          description: Array of session creation objects
      required:
      - items
    BatchSessionResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        created:
          type: array
          description: Created sessions
        failed:
          type: array
          description: Failed items with errors
    CreateProfileImageRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        file:
          type: string
          format: binary
          description: Profile image file (max 16MB)
        caption:
          type: string
          description: Optional caption
      required:
      - file
    ProfileImageResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: Profile image ID
        userId:
          type: string
          description: User ID
        url:
          type: string
          description: CDN URL of profile image
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          description: Update timestamp
    ListProfileImagesRequest:
      type: object
      properties: {}
    ProfileImageListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          description: List of profile images
        page:
          type: integer
          description: Current page
        pageSize:
          type: integer
          description: Items per page
        total:
          type: integer
          description: Total items
    GetProfileImageRequest:
      type: object
      properties: {}
    UpdateProfileImageRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        file:
          type: string
          format: binary
          description: Profile image file (max 16MB)
        caption:
          type: string
          description: Optional caption
      required:
      - file
    DeleteProfileImageRequest:
      type: object
      properties: {}
    DeleteProfileImageResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        deleted:
          type: boolean
          description: Deletion status
    BatchCreateProfileImagesRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        files:

# whatsapp-messaging-service API - API Documentation

## Endpoints

### AbsenceMessages

#### `GET` /api/v1/absence-messages

**List absence messages**

Returns a paginated list of absence messages with optional filtering, sorting, and full-text search.

*Requirement:* WA-BUS-004

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| page | query | integer | True | Page number |
| pageSize | query | integer | True | Page size |
| q | query | string | False | Full-text search query |
| filter | query | string | False | Filter expression |
| sort | query | string | False | Sort expression |

**Responses:**

- `200`: OK - List returned (X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset)
- `401`: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid token
- `500`: Internal Server Error - Unexpected failure

---

Returns a single absence message by ID.

*Requirement:* WA-BUS-004

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| id | path | string | True | Absence message ID |

**Responses:**

- `200`: OK - Item returned (X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset)
- `401`: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid token
- `404`: Not Found - Absence message does not exist
- `500`: Internal Server Error - Unexpected failure

---

Creates a new absence message with encrypted content.

**Responses:**

- `409`: Conflict - Absence message already exists
- `500`: Internal Server Error - Unexpected failure

---

**Responses:**

- `404`: Not Found - Absence message does not exist
- `500`: Internal Server Error - Unexpected failure

- `404`: Not Found - Report ID does not exist

- `201`: Created - Batch widgets created successfully. Rate limit headers: X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset.
- `400`: Bad Request - Invalid batch payload.
- `401`: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid token.
- `500`: Internal Server Error - Unexpected failure.
